prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fine-art restoration style image of an ancient Chinese lotus painting brought into photoreal life: one pale pink lotus blossom with about 8 broad translucent petals and a dark seed-and-stamen center, partially hidden behind a huge blue-green lotus leaf on the upper right. Compose the scene with exactly 4 prominent lotus leaves: 1 oversized soft-focus leaf filling the left edge, 1 oversized crisp dark teal leaf in the upper right with a single round water droplet, 1 oversized soft leaf cropping in from the lower right, and 1 small flat round leaf near the center with tiny dew along its rim. Add exactly 3 main stems: 1 tall smooth curved stem supporting the pink flower, 1 thin arcing hairy stem looping toward the small center leaf, and 1 delicate grasslike sprout rising from the bottom with narrow leaves and tiny buds. Use soft pale pink, muted blue-green teal, misty pale gray-white, and cinematic photoreal ancient Chinese ink-painting aesthetic. The atmosphere should be quiet, poetic, elegant, and minimal, with shallow depth of field, soft diffused backlighting, visible leaf veins, subtle mist, delicate dew, natural botanical textures, gentle contrast, and a high-end cinematic macro-photography quality. Keep the composition spacious and vertical, with no text, no border, no people, and no modern objects.
